title: Buckingham 3 Tier White Corner Plate Rack Kitchen Cupboard Tidy Storage Organiser Dish Rack Space Saving Shelf Organiser 23 cm
features: 𝐃𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Made from thick gauge iron wire with a hard wearing white plastic coating for strength, stability, and long-lasting performance.
𝐒𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐞-𝐒𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧: Maximises corner cupboard space keeping your kitchen organised and clutter-free with a smart 3-tier vertical plate storage system.
𝐍𝐨 𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐥𝐲 𝐑𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐝: Pre-assembled and ready to use straight out of the box simply place inside your cupboard or shelf and start organising instantly.
𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐔𝐬𝐚𝐠𝐞: Ideal for storing plates, bowls lids or dishware perfect for small kitchens flats or anywhere with limited cupboard space.
𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧 & 𝐂𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐧 𝐋𝐨𝐨𝐤: Finished in elegant white this rack blends easily with modern kitchen décor while helping to maintain a tidy, stylish environment.
description: Buckingham 3 tier corner plate rack ideal for organising your heavy plates in your kitchen cupboard, work top. Find and pick up your dishes faster. Pre-assembled ready to go straight into the cupboard. Constructed from iron steel construction finished in White Coating  . . . . . Dimensions: Width = 23 cm , Depth = 23 cm , Height . . . 21. 5 cm ( Note - dimensions are approximate ) NOTE: THIS OFFER IS FOR STAND ONLY. PLATES ARE NOT INCLUDED.
